steps.reason: Need to navigate to the page and read the content before generating tests
steps.summary: Browsed https://demo.playwright.dev/todomvc. Found 5 testable actions: Add new todos, Edit existing todos, Verify that todos are displayed correctly

plan.pageDescription: This is a demo of TodoMVC, a collection of To-Do list implementations in various JavaScript frameworks. The page displays a simple To-Do list interface with an input field to add new todos, and a list of existing todos that can be double-clicked to edit.
testableActions: Verify that todos are displayed correctly
Verify that todos can be marked as complete/incomplete
Verify that the 'Created by' and 'Part of' links work as expected
